name: dev-workflow
description: Developer workflow skills — skill creation (skill-creator-advance), skill quality scoring (skill-judge, 8-dimension rubric), portable git-backed project memory (git-memory), and multi-item proposal triage (proposal-critique). Git コミット・メモリ・スキル品質評価。可攜式專案記憶・技能品質評估・提案審查。
